checks.description: Guardrail: avoid fixed-cycle expectations; ensure behavior does not depend on exact latency.
notes: Conservative property to prevent hidden timing assumptions.
checks.pass_condition: Observed output changes must not be tied to a specific cycle count; any transition must remain stable for at least one clock after stimulus.
checks.trigger_condition: When edge-case stimulus (boundary patterns on pass_request) is applied.

notes: Functional guardrail ensuring observable progress after a legal operation.
checks.pass_condition: At least one observed signal must change value within one clock cycle after the pass_request stimulus.
checks.trigger_condition: When pass_request is toggled as defined in the basic_001 stimulus.
